# MergeWeave Attribution

This package ports and adapts merge editor concepts from MergeWeave / `mismerge`.

The upstream project is licensed under the MIT License.

Copyright (c) Davide Basso

The code in `@changeyard/merge` has been rewritten as framework-free TypeScript with
a React wrapper and Changeyard token-based styling. Svelte components, custom
elements, DOM query coupling, and upstream styles are not included.
